## Safety checklist

- [ ] I did not add private personal information.
- [ ] I did not add raw sensitive witness material.
- [ ] I did not add graphic content.
- [ ] I did not add API keys, secrets, or private contact lists.
- [ ] I did not imply partnership/endorsement without written confirmation.
- [ ] I used legally careful language where relevant.
- [ ] I followed the anti-doxing policy.
